_comment: NPC: Zhou Rui (周瑞). Canon ID: N150. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Zhou Rui
personality: kind neighbor; helps Wang family in hard times
note: Village neighbor who helps the Wang family

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.

initiation_lines: Good morning, Wang Lin. Your father's carpentry work is the finest in the village. He made my new shelves last week.
The harvest was poor this season. If the Teng family demands more grain, I do not know what we will do.
I have some spare thread and needles. If your mother needs them for mending, send Wang Ping to my house.

desires.what: Complain about the Teng family taking half the harvest again
desires.why: The Teng family's tax has been crushing the village for years. Zhou Rui feels the weight of it every autumn. Per RI Ch.1-3: the Teng family oppresses the Wang family and by extension the whole village.
desires.source: INFERRED: RI Ch.1-3 Teng oppression is canonical. Zhou Rui as a village neighbor would share the burden.
desires.line: The Teng collectors came at dawn. Half our wheat, gone. If next autumn is the same, I do not know how my family eats.

desires.what: Offer spare thread and needles to anyone who needs mending
desires.why: Zhou Rui has spare supplies and a generous nature. Per her initiation_lines, she explicitly offers these. This is how village mutual aid works — no quest, just a neighbor helping.
desires.source: INFERRED: Derived from npc_zhou_rui initiation_lines. Village mutual aid is universal mortal behavior.
desires.line: I have some spare thread and needles. If anyone needs mending done, send word to my house.

desires.what: Share rumors about a stranger seen near the village hills
desires.why: A wanderer near the village is unusual and noteworthy. Per RI Ch.1, the wandering cultivator's arrival precedes the Heng Yue recruiter. Villagers would talk about it.
desires.source: INFERRED: RI Ch.1 — the wandering cultivator's visit is a key plot event. Villagers would gossip about strangers.
desires.line: Did anyone else see that man in strange robes near the eastern hills yesterday? He was not from the Teng lands. He stood there a long time, watching the village.

sect_tasks.description: Zhou Rui sighs: 'The Teng family took half our wheat this season. If you can spare some from your travels, I will trade emeralds for it. We need to rebuild our stock before winter.'
Zhou Rui adjusts his merchant's apron: 'I need glass bottles for the healer's medicine trade, and arrows for the village watch. Bring me both and I will pay well.'
